<!-- ---
title: About
author: Emma Christensen
date: 'June 16, 2026'
format:
 html:
  code-fold: true
--- -->

# Project overview { .unnumbered .noexport }

These pages are generated from a Git repository...




## Section { .unnumbered .noexport  }

{{< lipsum 1 >}} 

## Section { .unnumbered .noexport  }

{{< lipsum 1 >}}
